subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Danzo is appointed as the leader of the Allied Shinobi Forces much to the dismay of the 'Raikage'. Meanwhile, Shikamaru and the rest of the Konoha 11 are given the order to eliminate Sasuke.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Naruto, Yamato and Kakashi try to attack Tobi but all the attacks go right through him. Meanwhile at the summit, Danzo's 'genjutsu' is dispelled and everyone splits up to capture Sasuke.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Naruto, Yamato and Kakashi are shocked by Madara's explanation of the rivalry between Itachi and Sasuke. Meanwhile at the summit, Sasuke and the 'Raikage' have a deadly showdown.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: After his 'Susanoo' is fully formed, Sasuke rushes to find and kill Danzo. But just as he enters the conference room, he is attacked by the five 'kages'.
